title: com.shippo.shipping.rate_detail
description: Vendor annotation extension for UCP fulfillment options. Each fulfillment option produced from a Shippo rate MAY carry a `com.shippo.shipping.rate_detail` object under the option, keyed by this reverse-domain identifier. The base option fields (id, title, description, totals) are defined by dev.ucp.shopping.fulfillment and remain the sole rendering contract. This object carries the machine-readable Shippo identifiers a Shippo-aware platform needs to turn the buyer's selection into an actual label purchase. Consumers that do not recognize the key ignore it, per UCP's open-option rule.

rate_id.description: Shippo Rate object_id. Pass this as `rate` when creating a Transaction (label) via the Shippo API.

provider.description: Carrier provider name from the Shippo rate (`provider`).

carrier_account.description: Shippo carrier account object_id backing this rate (`carrier_account`).

servicelevel_token.description: Shippo servicelevel token (`servicelevel.token`). Stable machine identifier for the carrier service.

servicelevel_terms.description: Carrier terms for the service (`servicelevel.terms`). Often empty.

estimated_days.description: Estimated transit time in days (`estimated_days`). Advisory average from the carrier, not binding. This is Shippo's raw integer point estimate; the base UCP option's structured `earliest_fulfillment_time` / `latest_fulfillment_time` are derived from it (see README). Kept here as the un-derived source value for a Shippo-aware platform.

duration_terms.description: Carrier's human-readable delivery-window phrase (`duration_terms`). This is the source text folded into the option `description.plain`.

arrives_by.description: Local time-of-day the shipment is expected to arrive, when the carrier provides it (`arrives_by`).

zone.description: Carrier rating zone for the shipment (`zone`).

amount.description: Original rate amount as a decimal string in `currency` major units (`amount`), preserved verbatim. The renderable price lives in the base option `totals[]` in minor units; this field is the un-rounded source value.

attributes.description: Shippo rate attributes (`attributes`). Advisory ranking flags a platform may use to pre-select or badge an option.
